meta.title: Claude for Dummies — The definitive guide to the Anthropic ecosystem
meta.description: Learn to use Claude, Claude Code and Cowork without technical knowledge. The most complete guide to the Anthropic ecosystem.

hero.sub: A practical, no-nonsense guide to Claude, Claude Code and Cowork. Zero code. Zero frustration. Only results.

what.headline: Imagine having a brilliant collaborator...
what.sub: Who never sleeps, never gets tired, knows almost everything and works at the speed of thought. That's Claude: the world's most advanced AI, made accessible for everyone.

pillars.title: Reasons and learns
pillars.desc: Not a search engine or a calculator. Claude reasons, infers, creates and can maintain hours-long conversations with full coherence.

pillars.title: Connects with everything
pillars.desc: Gmail, Notion, Calendar, Slack, your terminal, your local files… Claude integrates with the tools you already use.

pillars.title: Built with safety first
pillars.desc: Anthropic puts safety first. Claude has built-in ethical principles and robust privacy protocols.

ecosystem.headline: Three modes. One ecosystem.
ecosystem.sub: Claude is not just a chatbot. It's a platform with three distinct tools for different needs.

tabs.label: Claude Chat
tabs.analogy: Like WhatsApp with a genius on the other end.
tabs.description: The most accessible mode. You chat, ask, create documents, analyze data. Available on web, mobile and Chrome extension. Nothing to install.

tabs.label: Claude Cowork
tabs.tagline: Your AI office assistant on your desktop
tabs.analogy: Like hiring a personal assistant who works right on your own computer.
tabs.description: Cowork has access to your local folders and files. Give it a complex task (sort these 500 invoices, analyze these contracts) and it executes autonomously while you do something else.
features: Access to local folders and files

tabs.label: Claude Code
tabs.tagline: The programmer that works for you
tabs.analogy: Like having a senior developer available 24/7 who executes, tests and deploys code for you.
tabs.description: Claude Code runs in your terminal or VS Code/Antigravity. It writes and executes real code, creates websites, connects APIs, automates processes. You don't need to code: just tell it what you want to achieve.
features: Executes real code on your system

modules.headline: 7 modules. From zero to expert.
modules.sub: Follow the order or jump directly to what you need. Each module is independent and self-sufficient.

items.title: The Fundamentals
items.desc: Anthropic, models (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), tokens and pricing plans explained with analogies.

items.title: Claude Chat
items.desc: Effective prompts, connectors, Artifacts and Chat Skills. For everyone.

items.title: Claude Cowork
items.desc: Automate office tasks. Files, reports and workflows with no code.

items.title: Claude Code
items.desc: The most powerful coding agent. Configure, create projects and deploy to the cloud.

items.title: Skills & MCP
items.desc: The protocol connecting Claude with the rest of the world. Unlimited superpowers.

items.title: Plans & Pricing
items.desc: Compare Free, Pro and Max. Calculate your ROI and find the right plan for you.

items.title: Real Use Cases
items.desc: Freelancers, businesses, marketing, education. Practical inspiration to start today.

pricing.headline: How much does Claude cost?
pricing.sub: From free to professional. Choose based on your real usage.
